meta.title: Admin Revenue Console
meta.description: Review platform revenue settings, monitor payouts, and run fee scenario checks for growth planning.

header.title: PromptMarket Revenue Operations
header.subtitle: Set platform economics, review marketplace health, and validate fee impact before publishing changes.

settings.title: Revenue Settings
settings.current: Current policy: base {{basePercent}}%, premium {{premiumPercent}}% / threshold {{threshold}}, floor {{floor}}
settings.description: Support tiered fees: apply one fee below threshold and another at/above threshold for paid purchases.
settings.thresholdHelp: If purchase amount is at least this value, premium fee applies.
settings.floorHelp: Fee is never below this floor for paid purchases.

history.title: Change History
history.subtitle: The latest stored values and when they were last updated.

simulation.title: Fee Simulation
simulation.subtitle: Use a sample amount to compare current and draft fee settings.
simulation.monthlyPaidRatioHelp: Using {{percentage}} conversion (recent baseline {{paidRate}} from current stats).
simulation.impactGood: Projected seller payout improves by {{amount}} for the sample amount.
simulation.impactBad: Projected seller payout drops by {{amount}} for the sample amount.

creators.title: Top Creators
creators.subtitle: Creators ranked by payout with highest seller revenue first.
creators.emptyDescription: The summary will populate as sales are completed.
